projects.description: Venturalink bridges the gap between investors and entrepreneurs in India. It empowers business owners with bold ideas to connect directly with potential investors through a clean, interactive, role-based dashboard. The platform acts as a private venture marketplace that promotes smart capital allocation, innovation, and growth.
